purpose: Close DEBT-006 by assigning every known mass/unit/scoring anchor a hard status and enforcement rule.

anchors.name: electron mass as normalization anchor
anchors.reason: Electron mass may score a frozen prediction but cannot define the lepton scale or absolute S_e in a claimed derivation.
anchors.closure_rule: v6.7 must derive S_e without reading m_e as an input; only then electron mass may be used for post-freeze scoring.

anchors.name: muon and tau measured masses
anchors.reason: Muon/tau values are legitimate benchmark targets only after the release/action rule is frozen.
anchors.closure_rule: Any formula using measured muon/tau values before fingerprint freeze is invalidated and quarantined.

anchors.name: proton mass as hadron scale denominator
anchors.reason: A proton denominator is allowed for ratio scoring but cannot be the hidden absolute MeV scale for a derivation.
anchors.closure_rule: Hadron sector must either derive an absolute scale or mark all proton-normalized results as ratio-only.

anchors.name: u-quark and c-quark inherited anchors
anchors.reason: Single-quark masses are not stable observables in isolation and cannot silently anchor hadron predictions.
anchors.closure_rule: Quark sector must route through explicit confinement / triplet / meson operators before benchmark scoring.

anchors.name: Planck energy E0 from accepted dimensional constants
anchors.reason: Planck energy supplies dimensional units from non-particle-mass constants; it does not by itself fit the spectrum.
anchors.closure_rule: Any mass claim still requires independently derived dimensionless information action S_I.

anchors.name: Landauer scale kBT ln2 and Schumann quantum h f0
anchors.reason: These are allowed dimensional audit scales, but v6.0B showed they require huge N_eff for MeV masses.
anchors.closure_rule: May be used only with explicit N_eff ledger and cannot masquerade as a derived particle mass scale.

anchors.name: F_hadron / exact hadron scale candidates
anchors.reason: Potentially valuable structural evidence, but not usable as an input scale until executable non-mass provenance exists.
anchors.closure_rule: Promote only after source-derived operator path is demonstrated without benchmark masses.

anchors.name: PDG / measured particle tables
anchors.reason: Measured tables are scoring surfaces, never derivation inputs.
anchors.closure_rule: All benchmarks must reference a formula fingerprint generated before table read/scoring.

anchors.name: v6.1 information-action target ledger generated from measured masses
anchors.reason: The target ledger is a diagnostic inverse map, not an allowed source for deriving S_I.
anchors.closure_rule: v6.7 must calculate S_I from geometry first, then compare to the target ledger.

anchors.name: Information Operator OI = ln2/(24*pi)
anchors.reason: OI is a project operator, not a mass anchor; v6.5 allows it operationally but leaves document-source indexing to DEBT-011.
anchors.closure_rule: v6.6/v6.5-next source index must bind OI to source documents and operator provenance.

anchors.name: Ramanujan scaling component
anchors.reason: Ramanujan component is a structural operator, not a unit anchor, but source binding is still owed.
anchors.closure_rule: Source index must bind the Ramanujan operator to exact documents/fragments before further promotion.

anchors.name: sigma(n)/R(n) prime-product hadron carrier
anchors.reason: This is a structural carrier, not a mass anchor, but hadron scale promotion is blocked until source binding and sector split.
anchors.closure_rule: Use for frozen ratio hypotheses only until source index and sector split are complete.

debt_delta.name: unit anchors removal ledger
debt_delta.scope: This closes the process debt that anchors lacked explicit status. It does not derive electron S_e, hadron scale, or spectrum closure.
remaining_dependent_debts: DEBT-007 absolute electron action offset S_e
DEBT-009 hadron and meson sector split
rules_installed: Mass anchors cannot be used as derivation inputs before formula fingerprint freeze.
Measured particle tables are scoring-only after freeze.
Planck E0 is allowed only as dimensional normalizer, not as spectrum proof.
Quark single-particle anchors are denied for hadron derivation without confinement/triplet/meson operators.
Unknown provenance scale candidates stay quarantined.
OI/Ramanujan/sigma-R are operator constants pending source index, not unit anchors.
